meta.description: NOTE: The Apply workflow is now handled entirely in the browser (parts-mapper.html). This workflow is kept as a reference but is no longer called by the mapper. The browser: downloads the GLB, rewrites mesh node names, uploads new version, and saves the mapping attachment — all client-side.

name: VNTANA — Parts Tree Apply (unused — browser handles apply)

parameters.responseBody: ={"deprecated": true, "message": "Apply is now handled in the browser. This webhook is no longer used."}
